title: Better Buttons
description: Improving the look of menu buttons and widgets for a cleaner UI
body:
### Note: This is still work in progress! (for 1.20 and 1.20.1 specifically)

# Better Buttons

Give Minecraft’s menus a sleek refresh! This resource pack makes **menu buttons and widgets** cleaner, simpler, and easier on the eyes — with a smooth green highlight when hovered.

## Features:

- Redesigned **menu buttons** and UI widgets for a more **minimal, modern look**

- Buttons are outlined **green when highlighted**

- Works across all menus: main menu, settings, etc.

- Includes **mod compatibility** for popular mods (see below!)

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/647f57e492f7f7b5b5f2e8f6e1e59f150db3171a.png)

## Compatibility:

- **Resource Pack**: Minecraft **1.20 - 1.21.10**

- **Mod Compatibility**:
  
  This pack includes matching widget textures for several mods to keep the menus consistent and stylish:

<details>
<summary>Supported Mods</summary>

 - [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches),
 - [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi),
 - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris),
 - [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei),
 - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu),
 - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports),
 - [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)

</details>

- No dependencies needed
